zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger de Lancaster於1220年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德達爾時，他的父親Gilbert De Lancaster36歲，母親Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster26歲。他和Lady Phillipa de Bolebec至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1291年2月22日在英國維斯特莫藍德維黑斯拉可享年71歲，埋葬在英國艾可斯坦斯泰德 莫特費其特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger de Lancaster于1220年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德達爾时，他的父亲Gilbert De Lancaster36岁，母亲Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster26岁。他和Lady Phillipa de Bolebec至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1291年2月22日在英国維斯特莫藍德維黑斯拉可享年71岁，埋葬在英国艾可斯坦斯泰德 莫特費其特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger de Lancaster was born in 1220, in Rydal, Westmorland, England, his father, Gilbert De Lancaster, was 36 and his mother, Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster, was 26. He had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Phillipa de Bolebec. He died on 22 February 1291, in Witherslack, Westmorland, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger de Lancaster est né en 1220, à Rydal, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert De Lancaster, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Phillipa de Bolebec. Il est décédé le 22 février 1291, à Witherslack, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger de Lancaster 1220 in Rydal, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert De Lancaster 36 und seine Mutter Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster 26. Er hatte mit Lady Phillipa de Bolebec mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1291 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Witherslack, Westmorland, England und wurde in Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Lancaster è nato il nel 1220 nel Rydal, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Gilbert De Lancaster, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Phillipa de Bolebec. Morì il 22 febbraio 1291, nel Witherslack, Westmorland, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lancasterが1220年にイギリスウエストモーランドリダルで生まれた時，父Gilbert De Lancasterは36歳，母Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancasterは26歳であった。彼はLady Phillipa de Bolebecとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1291年2月22日にイギリスウエストモーランドウィスエルスラックで71歳で死去し，イギリスエセックススタンステド モウントフィトチェトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Lancaster(이)가 1220년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 리다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert De Lancaster(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Lady Phillipa de Bolebec(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1291년 2월 22일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 위더슬랙에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 스탠스테드 모우트핏쳇에 묻혔다.

mn.Penrith,, Cumbria, England: Penrith, Cumbria, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Lancaster nasceu em 1220, em Rydal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert De Lancaster, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Phillipa de Bolebec. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1291, em Witherslack, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger de Lancaster родился в 1220 г. в местности ридаль, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert De Lancaster было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster, 26. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lady Phillipa de Bolebec. Он умер 22 февраля 1291 г. в местности витирслакк, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности станстед маунтфичет, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger de Lancaster nació en 1220, en Rydal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert De Lancaster, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Paramour of FitsReinfrid De Lancaster, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Phillipa de Bolebec. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1291, en Witherslack, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Stansted Mountfitchet, Essex, Inglaterra.
